description: DHero restaurant pipeline — canonical field spec for locations and items collections

fields.name: lead_id
fields.notes: MD5 hash of stable identifiers (restaurant_name + restaurant_city + restaurant_address). Also used as _id.

fields.name: url
fields.notes: page['url']. null for APP sources.

fields.name: date
fields.notes: Scraped-at timestamp. Format: '%Y%m%d %H:%M:%S'

fields.name: crawled_source
fields.notes: Always 'WEB' for HTML scrapers. Internal tracking field.

fields.name: restaurant_country
fields.notes: INFER — 2-letter ISO country code. Hardcoded per project during Phase 1. Example: 'AE', 'PA', 'BD'. Never blank.

fields.name: restaurant_position
fields.notes: FROM_VARS — rank passed from listings parser. Key: page['vars']['rank_in_listing']. May be empty when not available.

fields.name: restaurant_name
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD name → og:title → CSS. Required — never blank.

fields.name: restaurant_address
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD address.streetAddress → CSS. Street address only. null if not available.

fields.name: restaurant_city
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD address.addressLocality → CSS. null if not available.

fields.name: restaurant_area
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD address.addressRegion → CSS. State, district, or neighbourhood (the region). null if not available.

fields.name: restaurant_post_code
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD address.postalCode → CSS. null if not available.

fields.name: restaurant_lat
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD geo.latitude → meta place:location:latitude → CSS data attribute. null if 0 or missing.

fields.name: restaurant_long
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD geo.longitude → meta place:location:longitude → CSS data attribute. null if 0 or missing.

fields.name: phone_number
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD telephone → meta business:contact_data:phone_number → CSS. Include country code. Multiple numbers joined by ', '. null if not available.

fields.name: restaurant_rating
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD aggregateRating.ratingValue → CSS. Use most general rating if multiple exist. null if 0 or missing.

fields.name: number_of_ratings
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD aggregateRating.reviewCount → CSS. Strip non-digits. null if 0 or missing.

fields.name: main_cuisine
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD servesCuisine (first value if array) → CSS. Exactly one cuisine. null if not available.

fields.name: restaurant_delivers
fields.notes: DETERMINE — true if site/tags indicate delivery service. Default false when source has no delivery option.

fields.name: is_permanently_closed
fields.notes: HARDCODED false — client only wants open restaurants. If a closed-indicator selector exists on the site, set to false for all available restaurants and use the selector to skip closed ones during listing. null if no suitable selector exists. Added ~May 2023.

fields.name: input_lat
fields.notes: FROM_VARS — latitude from the input list. Only populated when doing a geo-coordinate search. Key: page['vars']['input_lat']. Confirm applicability during feasibility check. Added Aug 2023.

fields.name: input_long
fields.notes: FROM_VARS — longitude from the input list. Only populated when doing a geo-coordinate search. Key: page['vars']['input_long']. Confirm applicability during feasibility check. Added Aug 2023.

fields.name: cuisine_name
fields.notes: FIND — Hash of all cuisine types. Keys: cuisine1, cuisine2, ... Built from JSON-LD servesCuisine array or CSS. Example: {cuisine1: 'Pizza', cuisine2: 'Burger'}. Empty hash {} if none found.

fields.name: opening_hours
fields.notes: FIND — Hash keyed by day abbreviation (Mon..Sun). Values are arrays of 'HHMM-HHMM' strings. Days closed should be omitted (not present with empty array). Example: {Mon: ['0900-2200']}. JSON-LD openingHours/openingHoursSpecification → CSS. null if unavailable.

fields.name: restaurant_tags
fields.notes: FIND — Array of feature/service strings (e.g. 'Delivery', 'Takeaway', 'Parking'). CSS. null if empty.

fields.name: restaurant_delivery_zones
fields.notes: FIND — Array of hashes: [{delivery_zone: str, minimum_order_value: float, delivery_fee: float, currency: str}]. null if not available.

fields.name: free_field
fields.notes: A2 only. null unless client explicitly requests extra restaurant fields (e.g. owner email, shop type). If any internal key is missing its value should be null.

fields.name: img_url
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD image (first if array) → og:image → CSS. Restaurant hero image. Internal field — not exported to A1 or A2.

fields.name: description
fields.notes: FIND — JSON-LD description → og:description → CSS. Internal field — not exported to A1 or A2. null if empty.

fields.name: item_id
fields.notes: MD5 hash of restaurant_id + item_name + loop index. Also used as _id. Never null.

fields.name: url
fields.notes: page['url']. null for APP sources.

fields.name: date
fields.notes: Scraped-at timestamp. Format: '%Y%m%d %H:%M:%S'

fields.name: crawled_source
fields.notes: Always 'WEB' for HTML scrapers. Internal tracking field.

fields.name: currency
fields.notes: INFER — 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code, inferred from site/country during Phase 1. Example: 'USD', 'AED', 'BDT'. Hardcoded per project. Never null.

fields.name: lead_id
fields.notes: FROM_VARS — restaurant lead_id passed from restaurant_details parser. Same value as the restaurant's lead_id in A1/A2. Key: page['vars']['loc_id']. Repeats for every item in the restaurant.

fields.name: restaurant_id
fields.notes: FROM_VARS — same value as lead_id. Used internally for item_id computation. Key: page['vars']['loc_id'].

fields.name: restaurant_name
fields.notes: FROM_VARS — passed from restaurant_details parser for item_id computation context. Internal field. Key: page['vars']['restaurant_name'].

fields.name: restaurant_url
fields.notes: FROM_VARS — restaurant detail page URL. Internal field. Key: page['vars']['restaurant_url'].

fields.name: cuisine
fields.notes: FROM_VARS — main_cuisine passed from restaurant_details parser. Internal field. Key: page['vars']['cuisine'].

fields.name: item_name
fields.notes: FIND — Menu item name. Required — skip item if nil. Never null in A3.

fields.name: item_description
fields.notes: FIND — Item description text. null if not available.

fields.name: item_price
fields.notes: FIND — Numeric price, currency symbol stripped. When item_is_promoted=true, this is the current (discounted) price. null if 0 or unparseable — not '0'. Watch decimals in SA/French sources.

fields.name: item_is_promoted
fields.notes: DETERMINE — true if item is under a promo section or carries a promotion marker (favourite star, promo badge, etc.). Default false when no promotion info available. Never null.

fields.name: original_price
fields.notes: FIND — Pre-promotion price. Populated when item_is_promoted=true and original price is visible (item_price is the discounted price). null when not on promotion. Must always be present in the output hash. Added Jun 2023.

fields.name: menu_category
fields.notes: FIND — Menu section/category heading the item belongs to. Examples: 'Sides', 'Noodles', 'Picked for you'. Read from vars['category_name'] if set by menu_listings, otherwise discover from page CSS. null if not available. Added Sep 2022.

fields.name: menu_item_image_url
fields.notes: FIND — Item image URL. Check both src and data-src for lazy-loaded images. null if not available. Added Sep 2022.

fields.name: free_field
fields.notes: A3 only. null unless client explicitly requests extra item fields. If any internal key is missing its value should be null.

fields.name: is_available
fields.notes: FIND — Internal tracking field. false if a sold-out marker element is present, otherwise true.

fields.name: item_attributes
fields.notes: FIND — Internal tracking field. JSON string of dietary labels/tags. Each value wrapped in single quotes. Example: {"tags":"'Halal','Vegan'"}. null if none.

fields.name: barcode
fields.notes: FIND — Internal tracking field. Usually null for restaurant menu items. Include if exposed in data attributes.

fields.name: sku
fields.notes: FIND — Internal tracking field. From data-item-id or data-id attribute. null if not available.
